name: writhing_stalker.live_zombie_distraction_mcw
description: Live zombie-distraction positive row: nearby zombies raise opportunity only in a vulnerable/evidenced scene.

steps.label: post_load_zombie_distraction_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: vulnerable-midnight stalker plus zombie-pressure fixture loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_midnight_before_zombie_distraction
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected time before live writhing-stalker window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local midnight before zombie distraction window

steps.label: audit_saved_monsters_before_zombie_distraction
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain required live-scenario footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved active_monsters proves a walkable-floor staged stalker plus nearby zombies before the live window

steps.label: audit_saved_stalker_floor_before_zombie_distraction
steps.abort_reason: installed save placed the staged writhing stalker on a non-floor tile before the zombie-distraction live row
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved map metadata proves the staged writhing stalker starts on walkable floor footing, not the reinforced wall that dirtied prior runs

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_zombie_distraction
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live turn window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_zombie_distraction_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded live turn window runs with zombie pressure and vulnerable/evidenced player

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_zombie_distraction_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked evidenced zombie-pressure shadow/strike lines
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves zombies amplify an already evidenced/vulnerable opportunity; current footing keeps zombie pressure in the local count through the strike window; the exact count can vary as zombies move during approach

evidence_contract.claim: zombie pressure contributes to a legal evidenced/vulnerable strike window without being the evidence source
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for writhing-stalker live fun behavior
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: these scenarios prove bounded live-plan behavior from current-run logs plus saved start-state footing; persistent map mutation is not part of the product claim.
